name: the consult engine ingests the full aggregated surface of 118 rules (not the 18-source subset)
command: printf '%s' '{"pillars":{"security":[{"concern":"c","source_id":"owasp-asvs","grounding":"grounded"}]},"needs_grounding":[]}' > d.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-consult.sh" --design d.json 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'full-surface-consult rules_total=118 ' e.txt && echo ingests-118-rules 1>&2
